items.name_en: P 🌹 (Small) 🎉 New Arrival 🎉 1BD292A 🎉 This System soft lambskin shoulder bag is embellished with a triangular pattern crafted with exquisite stitching, highlighting the brand's craftsmanship. The flap design features a chain handle that evokes jewelry associations / and is detachable. The front metal-engraved logo is outlined by the iconic triangular stitching, showcasing the brand's style. Can be carried by hand / shoulder / crossbody, highly functional 👍. If you like it, get yours now 🎉🎉

items.name_en: Pink 🎉 New Prada nylon Hobo handbag/crossbody bag 😘😘 The hobo style that went viral among internet influencers is back with a new design! 👏👏 This Hobo bag has a great design 👍👍 Multi-functional 😘😘 Waist bag/Shoulder bag/Single strap 👍👍 Handles replaced with chains, adding a touch of sexiness as a shoulder bag, and comes with a long strap. The best part is the strap has a small charm (mini bag) that can also be used to hang other bags or on the waist as an accessory 🙊🙊 Goes with any outfit 😘😘 Ladies, hurry up and get one, it's so beautiful 🙊🙊 Model: 1BH204, Size: 22x12x6cm
